yes that is correct great now may I have the last four digits of your social security number yeah that is one two three four 1234 thank you for confirming your identity you have been successfully your service request number is T K T 9 D 3 8 1 7 D 6 I will repeat that T K T 9 D 3 8 1 7 D 6 once you receive the card please activate it through the app or call the activation number also I recommend monitoring your account for any unusual activity over the next few days yeah I will do that okay is there anything else I can help you with today no thanks that is all thank you for calling Inspira Financial have a nice day
